category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to the Rwandan market (RSB pre-export verification of conformity PVoC, Certificate of Conformity, S-Mark, RS standards adopting RS/EN 149, occupational-safety framework).

title.en: China-to-Rwanda PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入卢旺达（RSB）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入盧旺達（RSB）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626 / GB 19083) documentation against Rwandan market-access requirements administered by the Rwanda Standards Board (RSB): the mandatory Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme, Certificate of Conformity (CoC), the S-Mark of quality, Rwandan Standards (RS) adopting RS/EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), the occupational-safety framework, importer obligations, and the separate route for medical masks via the national health regulator (Rwanda FDA).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件与卢旺达市场准入要求对照，准入要求由卢旺达标准局（RSB）管理，涵盖强制性出口前合格验证（PVoC）计划、合格证书（CoC）、S-Mark质量标志、采纳RS/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的卢旺达标准（RS）、职业安全框架、进口商义务，以及医用口罩经国家卫生监管机构（卢旺达FDA）的独立路径。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件與盧旺達市場准入要求對照，准入要求由盧旺達標準局（RSB）管理，涵蓋強制性出口前合格驗證（PVoC）計劃、合格證書（CoC）、S-Mark質量標誌、採納RS/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的盧旺達標準（RS）、職業安全框架、進口商義務，以及醫用口罩經國家衛生監管機構（盧旺達FDA）的獨立路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited test report, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Rwandan law, the RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme scope and route, the adopted Rwandan Standards, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The PPE-vs-medical mask boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可实验室检测报告、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行卢旺达法律、RSB出口前合格验证（PVoC）计划的范围与路径、所采纳的卢旺达标准及目的地国执法实践。本文所述的PPE与医用口罩界定需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可實驗室檢測報告、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行盧旺達法律、RSB出口前合格驗證（PVoC）計劃的範圍與路徑、所採納的盧旺達標準及目的地國執法實踐。本文所述的PPE與醫用口罩界定需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: FFP respirators entering Rwanda are subject to RSB market control: imported consignments must hold a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued under the Rwanda Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme, against the applicable Rwandan Standard (RS) — Rwanda commonly adopts the EN 149 series as RS/EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3). Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not by themselves satisfy the RS/EN 149 route. A critical boundary: medical/surgical masks are regulated as medical products by the national health regulator (Rwanda FDA), a separate route from PPE respirators. Rwanda is landlocked — goods route via Mombasa (Kenya) or Dar es Salaam (Tanzania).
answer_first.zh: 进入卢旺达的FFP呼吸器受RSB市场管控：进口货物须持有依据卢旺达出口前合格验证（PVoC）计划针对适用卢旺达标准（RS）签发的合格证书（CoC）——卢旺达通常采纳EN 149系列为RS/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告本身不满足RS/EN 149路径。关键界定：医用/外科口罩由国家卫生监管机构（卢旺达FDA）作为医疗产品监管，与PPE呼吸器为独立路径。卢旺达为内陆国——货物经蒙巴萨（肯尼亚）或达累斯萨拉姆（坦桑尼亚）转运。
answer_first.zht: 進入盧旺達的FFP呼吸器受RSB市場管控：進口貨物須持有依據盧旺達出口前合格驗證（PVoC）計劃針對適用盧旺達標準（RS）簽發的合格證書（CoC）——盧旺達通常採納EN 149系列為RS/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告本身不滿足RS/EN 149路徑。關鍵界定：醫用/外科口罩由國家衛生監管機構（盧旺達FDA）作為醫療產品監管，與PPE呼吸器為獨立路徑。盧旺達為內陸國——貨物經蒙巴薩（肯尼亞）或達累斯薩拉姆（坦桑尼亞）轉運。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on change of RSB PVoC programme scope or adopted Rwandan Standards
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator (RSB, Rwanda FDA, RURA), standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
